diagrams.title: SE vs UX Venn Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows the relationship and overlap between Software Engineering and User Experience disciplines
elements: Keywords in SE: code, architecture, efficiency, testing
Keywords in UX: satisfaction, accessibility, emotions, usability
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how SE and UX are distinct but overlapping disciplines requiring collaboration

diagrams.title: Iterative Design Cycle
diagrams.description: Circular process showing continuous cycles of design improvement
elements: Arrows showing continuous flow between phases
diagrams.purpose: Demonstrate the cyclic nature of UX design and how it enables continuous improvement

diagrams.title: Design Thinking Double Diamond
diagrams.description: Model showing divergent and convergent thinking phases in design
elements: Phases labeled: Empathize, Define, Ideate, Prototype, Test
diagrams.purpose: Illustrate how design alternates between exploring possibilities and narrowing to solutions

diagrams.title: Agile SE-UX Integration Sprint
diagrams.description: Timeline showing how SE and UX work together in agile sprints
diagrams.purpose: Show practical integration of SE and UX work within agile methodology

diagrams.title: Nielsen's 10 Usability Heuristics Pyramid
elements: Level 3 (Advanced): Flexibility, Aesthetics, Error Recovery, Help
Examples and brief descriptions for each
diagrams.purpose: Organize and remember the 10 usability heuristics in a structured way
